title: BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute
short_info: BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (BRIC THSTI) has released the Apprentice Notification 2026 on 12 May 2026 on the official website thsti.res.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates within the age limit range who have a Diploma or Graduation in relevant fields are eligible to apply for these Apprentice vacancies. The online application process for BRIC THSTI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 has started on 12 May 2026 and will remain open until 02 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notificatio

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Biotechnology: B.Tech/BE/B.Sc in Life Sciences. Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Information Technology: Graduation in Computer Science/Information Technology/Computer Application or allied subjects OR Diploma in IT/Computer Science or Computer Application or allied subjects. Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Civil Engineering: Graduation in Civil Engineering or allied subjects OR Diploma in Engineering (Civil or allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above). Electrical and Equipment Maintenance: Graduation in Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation Engineering OR Diploma in Engineering (allied subjects). Passed within the last five years, minimum 55% marks (CGPA 6 and above).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.9,000/- for Graduates and Rs.8,000/- for Diploma holders
salary_details.details: Biotechnology: Rs.9,000/- per month Information Technology: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month Civil Engineering: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month Electrical and Equipment Maintenance: Rs.9000/- for Graduates and Rs.8000/- for Diploma holders per month

selection_process: Short-listing based on eligibility criteria Application submission through NATS portal
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BRIC THSTI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BRIC THSTI Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BRIC THSTI Apprentice recruitment is 02-06-2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the Apprentice post at BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Diploma or Graduation in relevant fields such as Life Sciences, Computer Science, IT, Civil Engineering, or Electrical/Electronics/Instrumentation Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered to the selected apprentices?
faq.answer: The stipend offered is Rs.9,000/- per month for Graduates and Rs.8,000/- per month for Diploma holders.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BRIC THSTI Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: You need to apply online by registering on the Apprenticeship Portal (nats.education.gov.in) and then searching for BRIC-Translational Health Science & Technology Institute to apply for the desired trade.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The duration of the apprenticeship is typically 1 year, as indicated in the salary details for each post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for the Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Apprentice post.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the application process?
faq.answer: You will need to upload documents like a photograph, Aadhaar card, bank passbook, degree/diploma certificates, and mark sheets.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
